title: valeriana spica
intro: Valeriana spica, also known as Cornish valerian or spotted valerian, is a perennial plant belonging to the Valerianaceae family. This plant has been utilized for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and antispasmodic effects, attributed to the presence of valepotriates and valerenic acids. The health benefits of Valeriana spica include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as a reduction in muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Valeriana spica include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
